title: goethea makoyana
intro: Goethea makoyana, also known as the Goethea tree or Makoya tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The bark and leaves of the Goethea makoyana plant have been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goethea makoyana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Goethea makoyana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
